summary: Hyunwoo initiates a plan to go professional by recruiting his brother into a new gaming team, aiming to reach the global top through their collaboration. During a celebratory gathering, Hyunwoo negotiates a deal with the 'New Continent' guild to secure a territory, which is essential for upcoming siege warfare. After the intense meeting, a drunken Hyunwoo stumbles into a private room to rest, where he is discovered by an admirer who recognizes him as the legendary 'Alley Boss'.
key_moments: Hyunwoo recruits his brother to form a professional gaming team.
Hyunwoo negotiates a territory deal with the New Continent guild to ensure his team can participate in future siege warfare.
A drunken Hyunwoo is discovered in a private room by a fan who identifies him as the Alley Boss.
